name: academorix/notifications-sdk
purpose: Typed Saloon SDK for the Notifications service — email, SMS, push, in-app, WhatsApp, templates, digests. Umbrella client built on academorix/api-sdk.
capabilities: Dispatch DTOs across email / SMS / push / in-app / WhatsApp
when_to_use: A domain service that needs to trigger a transactional notification to a tenant end-user.
when_not_to_use: For campaign-scale marketing blasts, use the platform sibling academorix/marketing package.
